title: Schoenoplectiella × uzenensis
taxonomy: Schoenoplectiella × uzenensis is a hybrid of the plant genus Schoenoplectiella. It is classified as a type of sedge, which is a member of the family Cyperaceae. Schoenoplectiella × uzenensis is further classified as a member of the subfamily Cyperoideae and the tribe Cyperaeae. This classification indicates its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family Cyperaceae. The classification of Schoenoplectiella × uzenensis is used in plant taxonomy to identify and distinguish it from other species.

The plant's bioactive compounds may help in reducing oxidative stress and promoting wound healing. Research suggests that Schoenoplectiella × uzenensis may also have antidiabetic and anticancer properties. Further studies are needed to fully understand and confirm its therapeutic potential.
